programme.title: Barney and Friends: Riffs Musical Zoo - Boats
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about an upcoming trip to the zoo. When the trip is postponed, Riff decides to create a musical zoo. He gathers instruments that sound like real animals. Everyone has a wonderful time at Riff's musical zoo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek takes a turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park!/BJ and Riff engage in a friendly contest to see which of them can find the loudest sound in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sweeter Than Candy
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Sweet Earth
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!
programme.desc: While Baby Bop and BJ are pretending to be pirates, Barney creates a magical island for their fantastic adventure. Together they discover ways to have fun while playing dress up, pretending, and being silly.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ’s efforts to decorate the park go awry when he accidentally paints the caboose several different colors. Baby Bop can’t wait for BJ and Riff to go on their camping trip.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.sub-title: A Bird of a Different Feather
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ and Baby Bop get into a debate of which is better: the sun or the wind. Rachel learns that the park is not only a place to come and play but it's also the home of many different creatures.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.sub-title: The New Kid - The Princess And The Frog
programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Old Man Clanton's daughter visits, he tries to persuade her to pursue Wyatt Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Chief Natchez fears being blamed for an attack on a wagon train, which was actually carried out by outlaws.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A young man just released from prison is determined to go straight. However, his efforts are being sabotaged by his girlfriend's brother, a gambler who has massive gambling debts.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill Brocius, outraged over crooked Sheriff Behan taxing the money they make on some of their illegal activities enlist Doc Holliday to frame the Sheriff.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A tavern keeper finds himself losing business to another bar owner whose niece recites poetry to customers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: On the road to Tucson, Earp finds a baby but the Sheriff of Pima County refuses to take the baby so Earp is left to find someone to adopt it.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Tom McLowery's wife doesn't like ranch life so the couple decides to move to Tombstone against the wishes of Frank.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.sub-title: A Papa for Butch and Ginger
programme.desc: Wyatt's deputy, Shotgun Gibbs, runs off a saddle bum who was hassling a pretty young widow who had hired him to help her go to Colorado.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp needs new deputies so Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for the job even though his sister-in-law hates Doc.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt tries to put a stop to ongoing border skirmishes between the Clanton gang and Mexican bandits.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: After the death of Old Man Clanton, Doc Holliday hatches a scheme involving Wyatt's brothers to help him in his desire to create an internal fight among the Clanton gang members.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A stagecoach holdup orchestrated by Johnny Ringo and Curly Bill gives Wyatt Earp the opportunity he's been waiting for--a chance to get the rival factions to turn on each other.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp recalls in court the details of the day when the Clanton gang rode into Tombstone to shoot it out with the Earps.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: After the shootout, Sheriff Behan wants the Earps and Doc hung or shot. Behan plans to charge them with murder while Curly Brocius and Johnny Ringo plan quicker revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp prepares for trouble when a group known as the Harlequins is expected to return to town. Although they disguise themselves as clowns, they have sinister intentions.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Doc Holliday takes a turn for the worse causing Dr. Goodfellow to recommend that Doc cut back on drinking.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Clanton gang is selling liquor to the Apaches with Ike and Phin hoping their contact will tell the location of hidden gold rumored to be in a cave.

programme.title: South Park: Ebola Senza Glutine
programme.desc: Mr. Mackey predica su quanto si stia meglio ad alimentarsi senza glutine. I ragazzi si convincono e South Park diventa così la prima città americana senza glutine!

programme.title: South Park: La Femminuccia
programme.desc: Il mondo odierno è complicato. Cartman e amici sono in crisi con la loro identità sessuale. Cartman non sa se entrare nella toilette dei maschi o delle femmine...il "transgenderismo" sembra dare loro delle risposte...

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy trova un'idea per fare soldi dal campo estivo: un trasporto di tendenza. Il suo successo genera inimicizie che porteranno ad un bagno di sangue di proporzioni epiche!

programme.title: South Park: Il Cespuglio Magico
programme.desc: Cartman e Butters vengono in possesso di un drone e pensano bene di utilizzarlo per farsi un giro nel vicinato...

programme.title: South Park: Freemium Non È Gratis
programme.desc: Stan è ossessionato dall'ultima app di Trombino e Pompadour i quali si rendono conto che il denaro che stanno guadagnando con il loro videogame non può comprare la felicità.

programme.title: South Park: Castigo Virtuale
programme.desc: Cartman fa credere a Butters che ciò che sta vivendo sia realtà virtuale, invece Butters sta semplicemente vedendo il mondo attraverso una normale maschera da sub.

programme.title: South Park: Il Gallo Magico
programme.desc: Kenny è osannato dai ragazzi perchè è bravissimo giocare a Magic: l'Adunanza. Presto però una variante del gioco avrà la meglio.

programme.title: South Park: #REHASH
programme.desc: Kyle vuole soltanto giocare ai videogiochi con il suo fratellino. Ma, quando Ike non vuole più giocare con lui, Kyle inizia a temere che la nuova generazione lo stia lasciando indietro.

programme.title: South Park: Incredibile e Coraggiosa
programme.desc: I ragazzi esprimono tutto il loro rispetto per Caitlyn Jenner nell'episodio più casinaro e coraggioso di sempre.

programme.title: South Park: Che Ne Sarà di Noi?
programme.desc: Garrison vuole costruire un muro per tenere fuori tutti i migranti senza documenti!

programme.title: South Park: Non È un Paese per Poveri
programme.sub-title: Non È un Paese per Poveri
programme.desc: La cittadina di South Park sta diventando troppo snob: Kenny decide che è ora di trovarsi un lavoro.

programme.title: South Park: No Yelper!
programme.desc: Gli yelper non sono ammessi perché i ristoratori di SP si rivoltano contro tutti i veri o presunti critici gastronomici.

programme.title: South Park: Spazio Sicuro
programme.desc: Cartman è vittima del body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek e Craig
programme.desc: Le ragazze asiatiche di South Park disegnano le immagini dei loro sogni su Tweek e Craig.

programme.title: South Park: I Terribili Ninja
programme.desc: Ritornano le divertenti avventure degli amici di South Park sempre alle prese con i fenomeni sociali del momento, vissuti con l'incoscienza adolescente e la satira adulta.

programme.title: South Park: Contenuto Sponsorizzato
programme.desc: Jimmy viene spedito nell'ufficio del preside per aver permesso, in quanto responsabile del giornale della scuola, che in un articolo venisse usata la parola "ritardato".

programme.title: South Park: Verità e Pubblicità
programme.desc: Il Preside Victoria, il signor Garrison e Caitlyn Jenner tornano a South Park per controllare la minaccia della pubblicità.

programme.title: South Park: PC Principal Final Justice
programme.desc: Kyle, traviato da Leslie, crede che Jimmy sia stato ucciso dal Preside P.C. e vuole convincere i suoi amici ad armarsi e lottare contro il dirigente scolastico, ritenuto la causa della diffusione delle pubblicità a South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Grappoli di Ricordi
programme.desc: Sulla bacheca della scuola appaiono insulti alle ragazze da parte di un account, dietro cui tutti credono si nasconda Cartman. Per protesta, le ragazze si siedono durante l'inno.

programme.title: South Park: Caccia al Troll
programme.desc: Il troll Skankhunt42 continua a pubblicare foto oscene e insulti sulle bacheche della scuola e sui profili delle mamme. I ragazzi credono sia Cartman e distruggono i suoi apparecchi elettronici.

programme.title: South Park: Anime Perse
programme.desc: Il padre di Kyle, visto il successo del troll Skankhunt42, continua a sua opera di trolling e a mantenere segreta la sua identità. Intanto la campagna elettorale continua e Mr. Garrison fa di tutto per perdere le elezioni.

programme.title: South Park: Fuori il Salsicciotto
programme.desc: Il governo danese organizza la caccia ai troll istituendo un sistema per rintracciarli in tutto il mondo. Gerald viene contattato da un altro troll, che cerca di fargli capire la gravità della situazione.

programme.title: South Park: Danimarca Trollata
programme.desc: Il programma danese contro i troll è in azione, ma i troll, per difendersi, escogitano un modo per trollare la Danimarca. Cartman e Heidi convincono ragazzi e ragazze della scuola a smettere di litigare e a lavorare insieme per aiutare la Danimarca.

programme.title: South Park: Fort Collins
programme.desc: Il sistema progettato dai danesi comincia a dare i suoi frutti: tutti i contenuti online di un'intera città, Fort Collins, vengono resi pubblici, gettando i cittadini nel panico. Gerald cerca di staccarsi dagli altri troll.

programme.title: South Park: Che Cosa Avete Fatto?!
programme.desc: Il risultato delle elezioni sorprende tutti e si ipotizza che siano state truccate. Il candidato perdente ingaggia Gerald per una missione: andare in Danimarca e distruggere il programma per rintracciare i troll.

programme.title: South Park: Ricordi la Casa Bianca?
programme.desc: Il neo Presidente Garrison comincia a prendersi qualche rivincita con i suoi concittadini che l'avevano umiliato. Cartman e Heidi scoprono di non essere gli unici a voler fuggire su Marte.

programme.title: South Park: Non È Divertente
programme.desc: Il giorno del rilascio on line del Troll-Trace si avvicina e il mondo è nel panico. I cittadini di South Park riescono a convincere il nuovo Presidente degli Stati Uniti a distruggere la Danimarca per impedire l'utilizzo del Troll-Trace.

programme.title: South Park: La Fine di Internet Come lo Conosciamo
programme.sub-title: La Fine di Internet Come lo Conosciamo
programme.desc: Il temuto Troll-Trace sta per essere rilasciato su internet. Kyle convince i suoi amici a intasare internet con commenti negativi e insulti per far impazzire il sistema. Gerald, nel frattempo, ha uno scontro con l'ideatore del Troll-Trace.

programme.title: South Park: Bianchi Che Ristrutturano Case
programme.desc: La relazione tra Cartman ed Heidi scricchiola. Eric trova molto più divertente Alexa, il nuovo assistente personale di Amazon. Lo stesso dispositivo però mette in pericolo i posti di lavoro di molte persone. Infatti i redneck della città protestano.

programme.title: South Park: Metti Giù il Telefono
programme.desc: Tweek è preoccupato per la situazione tesa con la Corea del Nord, perché il Presidente invia continui tweet di sfida, citando Tweek come esempio di coraggio.

programme.title: South Park: Un Giorno di Festa
programme.desc: Randy vuole combattere a tutti i costi la figura di Cristoforo Colombo perché è un oppressore di popoli e cerca di nascondere il proprio passato, ma Stan scopre che invece una volta osannava Colombo.

programme.title: South Park: Franchising, il Prequel
programme.desc: La puntata parla di come il Procione e i suoi Amici si siano formati nel tentativo comune di avere un franchise dei loro personaggi. Il primo passo è avere una serie su Netflix che in questo momento è propensa a produrre tutto ciò che arriva.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel e Eroina
programme.desc: Diverse morti per overdose si stanno verificando fra gli animatori in costume delle feste di compleanno.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel e Eroina
programme.desc: Diverse morti per overdose si stanno verificando fra gli animatori in costume delle feste di compleanno.

programme.title: South Park: Rilancia e Raddoppia
programme.desc: Cartman e Heidi sono ancora insieme nonostante le loro difficoltà e Kyle è deciso a scoprire perché Heidi accetta di rimanere con Eric anche se lui non fa che trattarla male. La stessa cosa capita con il Presidente americano che maltratta la nazione.

programme.title: Awkward: Schon wieder dieses Mädchen
programme.desc: An der Palos Hills Highschool naht Halloween, und die Geister aus Jennas Vergangenheit kehren zurück, und mit ihnen Jennas Unsicherheit.

programme.title: Awkward: Schuldgefühle
programme.desc: Jennas erstes Date für den Homecoming-Ball wühlt alte Schuldgefühle wieder auf. Sie fühlt sich gegenüber ihrem alten Ich schuldig und hat Mitleid mit den Mädchen, die keine Verabredung für den Ball haben.

programme.title: Awkward: Wenn die Nerven blank liegen
programme.desc: Mr. Hart ermuntert Jenna dazu, sich der Öffentlichkeit mitzuteilen. Dadurch wird sie mit verstörenden neuen Erkenntnissen über sich selbst konfrontiert.

programme.title: Awkward: Realitäts-Check
programme.desc: Jenna trifft sich mit Collin auf einen Kaffee und muss danach ständig an ihn denken. Und daran, was es heißt, einen Freund zu haben und gleichzeitig für jemanden zu schwärmen.

programme.title: Awkward: Jenna definiert sich neu
programme.desc: Zwischen Jenna und Matty gibt es Spannungen, weil Collin Jenna zu einer exklusiven Fotoausstellung bei sich zu Hause eingeladen hat.

programme.title: Awkward: Überraschung!
programme.desc: Nachdem sie mit Collin geknutscht hat, beschließt Jenna, das Ganze zu beenden, bevor Matty davon erfährt.

programme.title: Awkward: Und was ist dann passiert?
programme.desc: Was passierte wirklich auf der Überraschungsparty, und ist bei Jenna und Matty endgültig Schluss? Genau wissen das nur die beiden. Aber ihre Freunde rekapitulieren den schicksalhaften Tag und versuchen, sich einen Reim auf allea zu machen.

programme.title: Awkward: Partei ergreifen
programme.desc: Jenna beschließt, eine Grillparty zu schmeißen, bei der sich ihre Freunde mit dem Gedanken anfreunden sollen, dass sie und Collin ein Paar sind. Doch als ihre Freunde ihr zeigen, was sie davon halten, ergreift Jenna drastische Maßnahmen.

programme.title: Awkward: Die böse Saat
programme.desc: Nachdem Jenna nicht mehr mit Tamara und Ming befreundet ist, hat sie das Gefühl, nichts mehr zu verlieren zu haben und findet sich in einer kniffligen Situation wieder.

programme.title: Awkward: Ein ganz besonderes Video
programme.desc: Auf Vals Geheiß hin schreibt und produziert Mr. Harts Klasse ein ganz besonderes Video, dessen Handlung einem irgendwie verdächtig bekannt vorkommt.

programme.title: Awkward: Beinahe ein Held
programme.desc: Jenna ist noch immer sauer wegen des Streits mit ihren Freunden und will beim Feiern in der Stadt Dampf ablassen. Die Partynacht läuft jedoch anders als geplant, und Jenna braucht einen Helden, der sie rettet.

programme.title: Awkward: Der Wahlkampf
programme.desc: Jenna muss wieder auf den Pfad der Tugend zurückkehren. Doch sie hat ihren Freunden und ihrer Familie mehr Schaden zugefügt, als sie so schnell wiedergutmachen kann. Werden sie ihr verzeihen, oder muss sie extremere Mittel einsetzen?

programme.title: Awkward: Die alte Jenna
programme.desc: Jenna und ihre Mädels haben sich wieder vertragen, und sie denkt darüber nach, Matty wieder näherzukommen.

programme.title: Awkward: Gutes Karma
programme.desc: Jenna will ihre Fehler wiedergutmachen, indem sie Val ihren alten Job zurückbringt. Sie hofft, dass das Universum sie dafür belohnen wird und sie wieder mit Matty zusammenkommt.

programme.title: Awkward: Wer will ich sein?
programme.desc: Jenna muss sich in diesem unglaublichen Staffelfinale entscheiden, wer sie sein will.

programme.title: Awkward: Keine Frau ist eine Insel
programme.desc: Jenna beginnt ihr letztes Jahr an der Highschool und hofft auf einen Neuanfang, aber ihr Umfeld macht ihr da einen Strich durch die Rechnung. Dass sie noch immer Gefühle für Matty hat, macht den Schulalltag auch nicht gerade leichter.

programme.title: Awkward: Einfach zuhören
programme.desc: Jenna glaubt, Matty verhalte sich wegen der kleinen Bettgeschichte so distanziert, dabei steckt etwas ganz anderes dahinter. Währenddessen stellt Tamara Jakes musikalisches Talent in Frage.

programme.title: Awkward: Paten und Engel
programme.desc: Jenna und Matty einigen sich darauf, Freunde mit gewissen Vorzügen füreinander zu sein, doch als Matty sich nur noch für die Vorzüge interessiert, stellt Jenna die Freundschaft in Frage.

programme.title: Awkward: Sophomore-Schlampen
programme.desc: Jenna und Tamara bekommen für die Spirit Week ernst zu nehmende Konkurrenz, mit der sie sogar um Mattys und Jakes Aufmerksamkeit wetteifern müssen.

programme.title: Awkward: Der Übernachtungsbesuch
programme.desc: Jenna und Tamara übernachten zum ersten Mal auf dem Unicampus, wo alles ganz anders läuft als geplant. Lacey will ihre eigenen College-Erfahrungen sammeln, und eine Party bei Matty führt zu neuen Rivalitäten und Romanzen.

programme.title: Awkward: Die Krönung
programme.desc: Jenna hat eine Romanze mit einem Studenten, doch die Highschool-Dramen holen sie ein, als sie einen Schönheitswettbewerb für Männer organisiert. Währenddessen kämpft Tamara immer verzweifelter darum, Jake zurückzugewinnen.

programme.title: Awkward: Nächtliche Wirrungen
programme.desc: Was als ein netter gemeinsamer Abend geplant war, endet in einem absoluten Desaster. Jenna, die Matty mit Eva verkuppeln wollte, merkt, dass sie selbst immer noch Gefühle für ihn hat.

programme.title: Awkward: Knastgesellen
programme.desc: Nach ihrem Streit mit Matty beschließt Jenna, Luke im Wohnheim zu besuchen, doch ihre Hoffnung auf einen romantischen Abend wird enttäuscht. Matty und Jake verbringen eine Nacht im Knast, und Tamara wird in eine überraschende Liebelei verwickelt.

programme.title: Awkward: Mein Motivationsschreiben
programme.desc: Uni-Bewerbungen stehen an, und Jenna und Tamara wird klar, dass sie bald getrennte Wege gehen könnten. Eva sät weiterhin Zwietracht zwischen Matty und Jenna.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1987 the New Mexico Penitentiary housed hundreds of violent offenders, rapists, killers, men the juries put behind bars to protect society. On July fourth, seven of those men escaped.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger, the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seemfrom slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake! Hobie's and Jackie's lives hang in the balance. It is up to the Baywatch team to save them before it's too late!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After a recent earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother in Ohio. When they both show up at headquarters a few weeks later Mitch is surprised, especially when he hears the reason they are there.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: John Cort shows up at headquarters and convinces Mitch to compete in the Baja Run dune buggy race with him. What Mitch doesn’t know is Cort is keeping a secret which could land them both in a Mexican prison.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch has to work a 24-hour shift with Stephanie and entrusts Hobie with the responsibility of taking care of himself during that time. But Hobie becomes infatuated with an older girl and is pressured into throwing a party without Mitch’s knowledge.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Carter McKay has recently moved to Southern California to live with his father after his mother's death. When Hobie invites him to the annual father/son lifeguard competition Hobie learns the reason Carter is so embarrassed by his father.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a woman Mitch refers to as “The Mermaid” turns out to be the wife of a crime boss, an FBI agent comes to catch him before he can escape the country. Things become complicated when Mitch and the catty FBI Agent butt heads.

programme.desc: When the hot Santa Ana winds move in from the desert, things start heating up on the Baywatch beach in more ways than one, as it seems like all the “weirdos” in the world have been blown to the beach.
